text.title: AI Coding Agent Handoff Protocol Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of AI Coding Agent Handoff Protocol.

example.scenario: Agent asked to add a CLI flag. TASK.md names allowed paths (cli/, tests/), forbidden (db migrations). Agent edits exactly those files. Reviewer checks AC ('--dry-run prints planned actions, exits 0'). Verdict pass → merge.
